scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix services/product-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/inventory-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/order-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix services/product-service && npm run build --prefix services/inventory-service && npm run build --prefix services/order-service
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t garden/product-service:local services/product-service && docker build -t garden/inventory-service:local services/inventory-service && docker build -t garden/order-service:local services/order-service
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix services/product-service && npm install --prefix services/inventory-service && npm install --prefix services/order-service
